basic_details.job_title: NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Technology Rourkela (NIT Rourkela)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Rourkela (NIT Rourkela) Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Notification 2026 has been released on 01 July 2026 on the official website nitrkl.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years Age Relaxation: Relaxed up to 5 years for SC/ST/PWD/Female; 3 years for OBC (Non-creamy layer)

qualification.education_qualification: First Class Postgraduate Degree / M.Tech / MPharm (minimum 60% or CGPA 6.5) in Engineering or Basic Sciences with valid GATE/GPAT/NET, First Class Graduate Degree of Four Years (minimum 60% or CGPA 6.5) in Engineering/IT/CS/Pharmacy with valid GATE/GPAT/NET, MSc with GATE / GPAT / CSIR-NET JRF Qualified
qualification.details: First Class Postgraduate Degree / M.Tech / MPharm (minimum 60% or CGPA 6.5) including integrated PG degrees in Engineering or Basic Sciences (GATE Qualified mandatory with valid GATE/GPAT/NET score). OR First Class Graduate Degree of Four Years (minimum 60% or CGPA 6.5) in Engineering/IT/CS/Pharmacy (GATE Qualified mandatory for Graduate degree holders with valid GATE/GPAT/NET score). For MSc. holders, GATE / GPAT / CSIR-NET JRF Qualified is mandatory with valid GATE score as per Institute rule. All other guidelines and conditions apply as per OM SB/S9/Z-06/2019 dt. 01-02-24. Desirable: Preferably M.Tech /B.Tech in Biomedical Engineering/M. Pharm /M.Tech in Electronics Engineering/ M.Tech or Msc in Biotechnology/Chemistry with valid GATE/GPAT Score. Prior experience of working with biosensors / AI / bio-electronics / electrochemistry/diabetes is desirable and preferred.

salary_details.details: INR 37,000.00 /- per month (Year 1 & 2) + HRA INR 42,000.00 /- per month (Year 3) + HRA

selection_process: Shortlisting based on merit Online Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 13-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 13-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Rourkela JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at NIT Rourkela is 13th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a First Class Postgraduate Degree/M.Tech/MPharm or a Four-Year Graduate Degree in Engineering/IT/CS/Pharmacy with a valid GATE/GPAT/NET score. For MSc holders, GATE/GPAT/CSIR-NET JRF qualification is mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post is 28 years. Age relaxation is provided for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the JRF role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a stipend of Rs. 37,000/- per month for the first two years and Rs. 42,000/- per month for the third year, plus HRA.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the NIT Rourkela JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are accepted via email. You need to prepare your bio-data, attach necessary documents, and send it to the official email address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their merit, followed by an online interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position is a contractual role at NIT Rourkela.

faq.question: Q9. Does NIT Rourkela offer any age relaxation for specific categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided. It is up to 5 years for SC/ST/PWD/Female candidates and 3 years for OBC (Non-creamy layer) candidates.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains all detailed information regarding the recruitment.
